## Validation

## Promotion checklist (`next` -> `main` only)

- [ ] This PR's head is `next`
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` has a human-readable `[Unreleased]` entry
- [ ] User-visible changes, compatibility notes, and deferred work are summarized
- [ ] All required `next` checks are green
